_README: Known, hand-reviewed false positives from remarque-audit@0.5.0 --src source-scan (font-floor / hardcoded-color checks) — NOT the --palette contrast/gamut checks, which must always pass cleanly and are never suppressed here (see scripts/run-remarque-audit.mjs). Each entry is an EXACT file:line:category match — if a flagged line moves or its category changes, the entry stops matching and the finding resurfaces as a real failure requiring re-review. See astro-site/DESIGN-DEVIATIONS.md #6 for the full rationale, and the PR that introduced this file for the line-by-line audit-output evidence.

entries.reason: False positive: a GitHub issue-number reference in a comment (e.g. "#274") matches the audit's hex-color regex, which — unlike its --palette parser — does not strip comments before scanning --src files.

This file IS a Remarque palette/token file by role (global.css is the exact file passed via --palette; theme-deck.css is a generated, build-time contrast-validated palette per DESIGN-DEVIATIONS.md #4/#6) but its filename does not match remarque-audit's hardcoded isTokenFile allowlist (tokens.css / tokens-core.css / tokens-palette.css / fonts.css / globals.css / pages/tokens.astro). Verified by hand: every flagged line here is a --color-*/--font-* custom-property declaration or a comment inside such a block, not stray component CSS.
